pi_items.source: Task description line 3: 'Circle Radius 4 on ISLAND layer'
Task description line 4: 'Circle Radius 12 on ROADWAY layer'
Task description line 5: '8 units wide (offset 4 from centerlines)'
Task description line 6: 'Fillet the corners between legs and circle with Radius 6'
Task description specifies ISLAND layer exists (line 1), but exact entity count (3) is a specification not independently verifiable
Task description specifies ROADWAY layer exists (line 1), but exact entity count (7) depends on agent's trimming and filleting implementation
Task description line 5: '4 Approach Legs' and context implies 4 centerlines (N/S/E/W)

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic CAD design task requiring creation of a mini-roundabout in LibreCAD. All geometric parameters are verified: center at (100, 100), island circle radius 4, outer roadway radius 12, approach legs 8 units wide, and fillets with radius 6. The task requires three layers: ISLAND, ROADWAY, and CENTERLINES. Expected output file is roundabout_design.dxf saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/. The task is judged on successful creation of a properly trimmed and filleted roundabout design with all required geometric elements.
